text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide has lost something and has
enlisted my aid to help find it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's not here either! I can't find the notebook I wrote my winning equation in anywhere!
choice_data_list: Where do you usually keep it?
Where do you usually keep it?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I usually keep it right in my pocke—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... Here it is. Well... I must be more tired
than I thought.

It's not like her to be this forgetful. The fatigue
must be getting to her. It might be time to adjust
her schedule so she can take a break.
